title: dodonaea pinifolia
intro: Dodonaea pinifolia, also known as Needle Bush or Pine Bush, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapindaceae, native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Dodonaea pinifolia is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
